description_en: Lisbon, in Portugal, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 4.3/5. Muslim travelers will find 150 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Lisbon: 150 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 4.3/5.
sectionMangerHalal: À Lisbonne, cap sur Martim Moniz et la Mouraria : cantines bangladaises et pakistanaises halal, épiceries, biryanis à prix doux, à dix minutes à pied de la Baixa. La Mosquée centrale (Praça de Espanha) est entourée d'adresses fiables, et le poisson grillé portugais reste votre allié partout — gare aux sauces au vin.
sectionMangerHalal_en: In Lisbon, head to Martim Moniz and Mouraria: Bangladeshi and Pakistani halal canteens, groceries and budget biryanis, ten minutes' walk from the Baixa. The Central Mosque (Praça de Espanha) is surrounded by reliable spots, and Portugal's grilled fish is your ally anywhere — watch the wine-based sauces.
sectionOuPrier: La Mesquita Central de Lisboa (Praça de Espanha) accueille les prières quotidiennes ; des salles existent aussi côté Martim Moniz. L'aéroport Humberto Delgado dispose d'un espace multiconfessionnel.
sectionOuPrier_en: The Lisbon Central Mosque (Praça de Espanha) hosts daily prayers; prayer spaces also exist around Martim Moniz. Humberto Delgado airport has a multi-faith room.
